description: Hacker News from your terminal — with a local store, full-text search, and agent-native output no other HN tool has

tools.name: ask_list
tools.description: Get the latest Ask HN posts

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 200)

tools.description: Get the latest Hacker News job postings

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 200)

tools.description: Returns the largest item ID currently assigned by Hacker News

tools.name: show_list
tools.description: Get the latest Show HN posts

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 200)

tools.name: stories_best
tools.description: Get the highest-voted stories on Hacker News

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 200)

tools.name: stories_get
tools.description: Get details for a specific story, comment, job, or poll

tools.name: stories_new
tools.description: Get the newest stories on Hacker News

tools.description: Get the current top stories on Hacker News

params.description: Maximum number of story IDs to return (max 500)

tools.description: Items and user profiles that have changed recently
